title: diversifier_index stored as TEXT not INTEGER to avoid i64 overflow
description: db.rs migration v5 stores diversifier_index as TEXT (decimal u128). SQLite INTEGER is signed 64-bit; ZIP-32 diversifier is 88-bit. A contributor might change to INTEGER for simplicity. Preserve: comment calls this out explicitly and diversifier_index_roundtrip test writes u128::MAX to catch the regression. Keep as TEXT.
